title: rosa × polliniana var. mirabilis
intro: Rosa × polliniana var. mirabilis, also known as the 'Mirabilis' rose, is a variant of the Rosa × polliniana plant, a hybrid of Rosa rugosa and Rosa acicularis, resulting in a fragrant and ornamental flowering shrub. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × polliniana var. mirabilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
